trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all three bullish signals firing (MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) in a risk-on session where semiconductors lead; RSI at 56 leaves plenty of room before overbought territory.
Bitcoin miner with score 95 and clean bullish momentum signals is a direct beneficiary of risk-on sentiment; affordable price allows meaningful exposure within remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ leading at +1.1% creates a good entry window for high-scoring momentum names, particularly semiconductors and crypto-adjacent equities. Deployed available cash into INTC (high conviction semiconductor) and MARA (medium conviction crypto miner) to fill two of the four open slots. All six existing positions remain intact with no stop-loss triggers apparent given the portfolio's strong +32.4% overall gain.

market_education.summary_en: Markets moved broadly higher today with growth and technology stocks leading, as the NASDAQ gained 1.1% and the S&P 500 added 0.5% in a clear risk-on session. Investors rotated into higher-beta names including semiconductors and crypto-adjacent equities, reflecting improving risk appetite heading into the week. The move appeared momentum-driven with institutional positioning into beaten-down tech leaders rather than a single headline catalyst.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場普遍上揚，成長型及科技股領跑，納斯達克指數上漲1.1%，標普500指數上升0.5%，呈現明顯的風險偏好格局。投資者輪動至高貝塔值標的，包括半導體及加密貨幣相關股份，反映市場風險胃口持續改善。今日升幅主要由動能驅動，機構資金積極佈局超跌科技龍頭股，並非單一消息面催化所致。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on sentiment describes a market environment where investors feel confident enough to buy higher-risk assets — growth stocks, tech, crypto miners — in pursuit of bigger gains. Today's session, with NASDAQ up 1.1% and all our top screener picks flashing bullish momentum signals, is a textbook risk-on day. When risk-on dominates, high-beta names like MARA and INTC tend to outperform defensive assets like bonds and utilities.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」情緒是指投資者信心充足，願意買入科技股、成長股及加密貨幣等較高風險資產以追求更高回報的市場狀態。今日納斯達克指數上漲1.1%，篩選出的高動能個股全面亮起看漲訊號，正是典型的風險偏好交易日。當市場進入風險偏好模式，MARA、INTC等高貝塔值股票往往大幅跑贏債券及公用事業等防禦性資產。
